description: Ably provides realtime messaging infrastructure for applications, including pub/sub, chat, synchronization, and related developer tooling. It offers hosted APIs and tools for both message/data-plane access and account/application management.
summary: Ably exposes two documented HTTP APIs—a data-plane Platform REST API at `https://rest.ably.io` and a management Control API at `https://control.ably.net/v1`—plus the npm-distributed `ably` CLI; no public GraphQL or MCP server surfaced.
